name: Fat Loss Peptides
h1: Shop Fat Loss Peptides — GLP-1, GIP & Triple-Agonist Vials
seoTitle: Buy Fat Loss Peptides Online — Retatrutide, Tirzepatide, Semaglutide | Peptides Online
seoDescription: Buy fat loss peptides online — Retatrutide, Tirzepatide, Semaglutide and next-gen GLP compounds. ≥98% HPLC purity, sealed vials with lot CoA, free US shipping over $200.
content:
## What's on the Fat Loss Shelf

Fourteen products spanning single-, dual-, and triple-receptor compounds: Semaglutide (5 sizes, from $49.99), Tirzepatide (3 sizes, from $149.99), Retatrutide (4 sizes, from $149.99), Cagrilintide, AOD9604, Mazdutide, Survodutide, Tesofensine, Cagri-Sema, Cagri-Reta, and Reta-Cagri. All lyophilized vials ship sealed with a lot certificate of analysis.

## Choosing a Size: Best $/mg Breakdown

Larger vials always give a lower cost-per-milligram. For Semaglutide, the 30mg vial is the sharpest value — roughly a third of the $/mg cost of the 3mg entry. For Tirzepatide, the 60mg vial beats the 15mg by a wide margin. For Retatrutide, the 30mg vial is the best-value option. If you're ordering for the first time, the smallest size lets you verify quality before committing to a larger purchase.

## Which Compound to Start With

Semaglutide 3mg is the lowest-cost entry into this category at $49.99. It ships as a lyophilized vial — you'll need bacteriostatic water to reconstitute (add a 30mL BAC water vial to your cart). Tirzepatide 15mg is the dual-agonist entry. Retatrutide 10mg is the triple-agonist option. AOD9604 2mg ($39.99) is the lowest-cost growth hormone fragment in the category.

## Pre-Mixed Stacks

Cagri-Reta, Reta-Cagri, and Cagri-Sema ship as single pre-mixed lyophilized vials — two compounds per vial, one reconstitution. These are the most convenient option if you're ordering a combination. The stacks page has full stack breakdowns.

## What Every Order Includes

All vials ship with the original lot CoA from the third-party laboratory. ≥98% HPLC purity on every compound. Same-day shipping on orders placed before 2pm EST. Free shipping on orders over $200.

## Do You Need Anything Else

All lyophilized fat loss vials require bacteriostatic water for reconstitution. Tesofensine and AOD9604 capsule formats do not. Add a 30mL BAC water vial ($12.99) if this is your first order — one 30mL vial covers approximately 2–4 reconstitutions at typical volumes.

faq.question: How fast does shipping take on fat loss vials?
faq.answer: Orders placed before 2pm EST ship same day. US delivery typically arrives in 3–5 business days via tracked courier. Free shipping on orders over $200.

faq.question: Do I need bacteriostatic water for these peptides?
faq.answer: Yes — all lyophilized vials (Retatrutide, Tirzepatide, Semaglutide, etc.) require bacteriostatic water for reconstitution. Add a 30mL BAC water vial to your order. Capsule and liquid forms (Tesofensine, AOD9604 pre-dissolved) ship ready to use.

faq.question: What is the difference between Tirzepatide and Semaglutide?
faq.answer: Semaglutide is a GLP-1 receptor agonist only. Tirzepatide is a dual GLP-1/GIP agonist — it hits two incretin receptors. Published clinical comparisons show greater average weight loss with the dual mechanism.

faq.question: What is Retatrutide?
faq.answer: Retatrutide is a triple agonist targeting GLP-1, GIP, and glucagon receptors simultaneously — the most mechanistically complete compound in this category. Available in 10mg, 15mg, 20mg, and 30mg vials.

faq.question: Is there a bundle or stack for fat loss?
faq.answer: The Cagri-Reta blend and Cagri-Sema blend are pre-mixed stacks. The stacks page lists curated protocol combinations if you prefer to order individual vials and combine.

name: Recovery & Healing Peptides
h1: Shop Recovery & Healing Peptides — BPC-157, TB-500 & Blends
seoTitle: Buy Recovery Peptides Online — BPC-157, TB-500 & Blends | Peptides Online
seoDescription: Buy recovery and healing peptides — BPC-157, TB-500, PEG-MGF and blends. ≥98% HPLC purity, sealed vials with lot CoA, free US shipping over $200.
content:
## What's on the Recovery Shelf

Eight products: BPC-157 (lyophilized vial and capsule format), TB-500, BPC-157 + TB-500 Blend (5+5mg and 10+10mg sizes), PEG-MGF, Abaloparatide, ACE-031, and P21. All lyophilized vials include a lot CoA and ship with same-day dispatch for orders placed before 2pm EST.

## BPC-157 Vial vs Capsules

BPC-157 is available in two formats. The 10mg lyophilized vial requires reconstitution with bacteriostatic water. The capsule format (500mcg × 60 capsules) is pre-dosed and does not need reconstitution — no BAC water required. Both contain the same compound; the format determines the delivery method used in the research protocol.

## BPC-157 + TB-500 Blend: Is It Worth It

The BPC-157 + TB-500 Blend ships as a single pre-mixed vial (5mg BPC + 5mg TB-500, or 10mg + 10mg). The main advantage is convenience — one vial, one reconstitution, one needle. The price of the blend is competitive with buying both compounds separately. If you're ordering both, the blend is usually the better buy on a cost-plus-convenience basis.

## Pricing Overview

BPC-157 10mg vial: $59.99. TB-500 10mg vial: priced separately. BPC/TB Blend 5+5mg: from $59.99 — check the product page for current pricing. PEG-MGF is in the upper price range of this category. Abaloparatide and ACE-031 are specialty compounds with limited availability.

## What You Need to Order

All lyophilized vials require bacteriostatic water. BPC-157 capsules do not. Add a 30mL BAC water vial ($12.99) if you don't already have one. Store all unreconstituted vials at −20°C. After reconstitution, refrigerate at 2–8°C and use within 30 days.

## Free Shipping Threshold

Orders over $200 ship free via tracked US courier. A BPC-157 10mg ($59.99) + TB-500 10mg + BAC water order will typically clear the free shipping threshold. Delivery: 3–5 business days.

faq.question: What is the difference between BPC-157 and TB-500?
faq.answer: BPC-157 is a pentadecapeptide derived from gastric juice protein BPC. TB-500 is a synthetic version of Thymosin Beta-4 fragment (2-43). Both support tissue repair but act through different mechanisms — they are often combined in the BPC-157 + TB-500 blend.

faq.question: Can I order BPC-157 in capsule form?
faq.answer: Yes — BPC-157 Capsules (500mcg × 60) are available for oral protocols. Injectable lyophilized BPC-157 (10mg) is the standard vial format requiring BAC water reconstitution.

faq.question: How do I reconstitute TB-500?
faq.answer: Add bacteriostatic water to the lyophilized TB-500 10mg vial. Common target concentrations are 2mg/mL (add 5mL BAC water) or 1mg/mL (add 10mL BAC water). Mix gently — do not shake.

faq.question: What is the BPC-157 + TB-500 blend?
faq.answer: The blend ships as a single pre-mixed vial containing both peptides — 5mg BPC-157 + 5mg TB-500, or 10mg + 10mg. It eliminates the need to reconstitute two separate vials.

faq.question: Do ACE-031 and Abaloparatide require refrigeration?
faq.answer: Yes — all lyophilized peptides should be stored in the freezer (−20°C) long-term and refrigerated (2–8°C) after reconstitution. Reconstituted vials are stable for approximately 30 days under refrigeration.

name: Growth Hormone Peptides
h1: Shop Growth Hormone Peptides Online — GHRH & Ghrelin Mimetics
seoTitle: Buy Growth Hormone Peptides Online — CJC-1295, Ipamorelin, Sermorelin | Peptides Online
seoDescription: Buy growth hormone peptides — CJC-1295, Ipamorelin, Sermorelin, Tesamorelin, GHRP-2, GHRP-6 and GH-releasing blends. ≥98% HPLC purity, free US shipping over $200.
content:
## What's on the Growth Hormone Shelf

Twelve products across two compound families: GHRH analogs (CJC-1295 No DAC, CJC-1295 With DAC, Sermorelin, Tesamorelin) and ghrelin mimetics/GHRPs (Ipamorelin, GHRP-2, GHRP-6, Hexarelin, IGF-1 LR3). Pre-mixed blends — Ipamorelin/CJC-1295 and Ipamorelin/Tesamorelin — are also available as single vials.

## CJC-1295 No DAC vs With DAC: Buying Guide

These are two different compounds, not size variants of the same product. CJC-1295 No DAC (Modified GRF 1-29) has a short active window and is typically dosed multiple times per week. CJC-1295 With DAC has a long half-life (roughly one week) due to an albumin-binding linker and is dosed less frequently. Choose based on the dosing schedule of the protocol — they are not interchangeable.

## Cheapest Entry Points

Sermorelin 2mg is the lowest-cost GHRH analog at $39.99. Ipamorelin 10mg ($59.99) is the most popular ghrelin mimetic. CJC-1295 No DAC 5mg opens that product, with the 10mg vial offering better $/mg. All are lyophilized vials requiring BAC water reconstitution.

## Pre-Mixed Blends

The Ipamorelin/CJC-1295 blend and Ipamorelin/Tesamorelin blend each ship as a single pre-mixed vial. If you plan to use both compounds together, the blend eliminates a second vial and a second reconstitution. Priced competitively against buying the two vials separately.

## IGF-1 LR3 and the Upper Shelf

IGF-1 LR3 is a long-acting IGF-1 analog — a specialty compound at the higher end of this category's price range. It does not require stacking with other compounds from this shelf; it acts on IGF-1 receptors independently of GHRH/GHS pathways.

## What Every Order Includes

All vials: ≥98% HPLC purity, original lot CoA, sealed under nitrogen. Bacteriostatic water (30mL vial, $12.99) not included — add to cart if needed. Free US shipping over $200. Same-day dispatch before 2pm EST.

faq.question: What is the difference between CJC-1295 No DAC and With DAC?
faq.answer: CJC-1295 No DAC (Modified GRF 1-29) peaks and clears within hours, producing a pulsatile GH release. CJC-1295 With DAC includes a chemical linker that extends half-life to ~8 days via albumin binding. Different dosing schedules apply — they are different compounds, not just size variants.

faq.question: Can Ipamorelin and CJC-1295 be used together?
faq.answer: Yes — they are often combined because they target different receptors (ghrelin vs GHRH) and produce synergistic GH release. The Ipamorelin/CJC-1295 blend ships as a single pre-mixed vial.

faq.question: What is Tesamorelin used for?
faq.answer: Tesamorelin is a GHRH analog approved for HIV-associated lipodystrophy. Research interest focuses on its GH-releasing and visceral fat-reduction properties. Available in 10mg and 20mg vials.

faq.question: How much bacteriostatic water do I add to Sermorelin 2mg?
faq.answer: For a 500mcg/mL concentration, add 4mL BAC water to the 2mg Sermorelin vial. For a 1mg/mL concentration, add 2mL. Store reconstituted vial refrigerated at 2–8°C.

faq.question: What is IGF-1 LR3?
faq.answer: IGF-1 LR3 is a long-acting variant of insulin-like growth factor 1 with an N-terminal arginine substitution that reduces IGF binding protein affinity and extends half-life to ~20–30 hours versus ~10 minutes for native IGF-1.

name: Skin & Beauty Peptides
h1: Shop Skin & Beauty Peptides — GHK-Cu, GLOW Blend & SNAP-8
seoTitle: Buy Skin Peptides Online — GHK-Cu, GLOW Blend, SNAP-8, Melanotan | Peptides Online
seoDescription: Buy skin and beauty peptides — GHK-Cu copper peptide, GLOW Blend, KLOW Blend, SNAP-8, Melanotan I and II. ≥98% HPLC purity, free US shipping over $200.
content:
## What's on the Skin & Beauty Shelf

Six products: GHK-Cu (copper tripeptide, 50mg and 100mg), GLOW Blend, KLOW Blend, Melanotan I, Melanotan II, and SNAP-8. All ship as lyophilized vials with a lot CoA. GHK-Cu is the anchor product of this category and the most-ordered skin peptide in the catalog.

## GHK-Cu: 50mg vs 100mg

GHK-Cu comes in two sizes. The 100mg vial offers a significantly lower $/mg than the 50mg — if you're ordering GHK-Cu at all, the 100mg is almost always the better buy unless you specifically need a smaller quantity for a short protocol. Price difference is listed on the product page.

## Melanotan I vs Melanotan II

Both are melanocortin peptides that affect melanin production. Melanotan II is the more potent of the two and also has effects on other melanocortin receptors. Melanotan I (afamelanotide) has higher selectivity for the MC1R receptor. These are separate products with different receptor profiles — not interchangeable. Both require BAC water reconstitution.

## The GLOW and KLOW Blends

The GLOW Blend (50mg and 70mg sizes) and KLOW Blend are proprietary multi-peptide stacks combining several skin-active compounds in a single vial. The blends are the most convenient option if the protocol calls for multiple skin peptides — one vial, one reconstitution. Pricing is competitive with the component compounds purchased individually.

## SNAP-8: What to Know Before Ordering

SNAP-8 (acetyl octapeptide-3) is a lyophilized peptide used in topical application protocols. It does not require the same reconstitution approach as injectable peptides — dissolve in the carrier appropriate for the intended topical use.

## Free Shipping and Order Building

GHK-Cu 100mg + GLOW Blend or any skin-peptide combination totaling $200+ qualifies for free tracked US shipping. Add a 30mL BAC water vial if reconstitution is required for your chosen products. Delivery 3–5 business days.

faq.question: What is GHK-Cu used for in research?
faq.answer: GHK-Cu (copper tripeptide) is studied for its roles in collagen synthesis signaling, wound healing, antioxidant response, and skin barrier function. It is one of the most characterized skin peptides in the research literature.

faq.question: What is the difference between GLOW and KLOW blends?
faq.answer: GLOW Blend is a skin peptide combination in 50mg and 70mg sizes. KLOW Blend adds KPV (Lys-Pro-Val, an α-MSH fragment) to the formulation at 80mg total — a different peptide composition, not just a larger size of GLOW.

faq.question: What is Melanotan II used for?
faq.answer: Melanotan II is a cyclic α-MSH analog studied for its melanocortin receptor activity. It is a different molecule from Melanotan I (linear afamelanotide) and from PT-141 (bremelanotide) — these are kept as separate products.

faq.question: Is SNAP-8 a standalone compound?
faq.answer: SNAP-8 (acetyl octapeptide-3) is a research-grade peptide supplied as a lyophilized 10mg vial. In cosmetic chemistry it is referenced as a botulinum toxin peptide analog. It pairs commonly with GHK-Cu in skin research protocols.

faq.question: How much bacteriostatic water for GHK-Cu 50mg?
faq.answer: For a 1mg/mL solution, add 50mL BAC water. For a 2mg/mL solution, add 25mL. GHK-Cu dissolves readily — mix gently until clear, then store refrigerated at 2–8°C.

name: Nootropic Peptides
h1: Shop Nootropic Peptides — Semax, Selank, DSIP & Cognitive Compounds
seoTitle: Buy Nootropic Peptides Online — Semax, Selank, Adamax, DSIP, PE-22-28 | Peptides Online
seoDescription: Buy nootropic peptides — N-Acetyl Semax Amidate, Selank, NA-Selank, Adamax, PE-22-28, DSIP and SLU-PP-332. ≥98% HPLC purity, free US shipping over $200.
content:
## What's on the Nootropics Shelf

Nine products: N-Acetyl Semax Amidate, NA-Selank Amidate, Adamax, PE-22-28, DSIP, SLU-PP-332 Capsules (30 or 120 capsule packs). All lyophilized vials include a lot CoA and ship same-day before 2pm EST.

## SLU-PP-332: The Only Oral Format Here

SLU-PP-332 is the only capsule format in this category — no reconstitution needed. It comes in 30-capsule (100mg) and 120-capsule (100mg) packs. The 120-capsule pack is the better value per capsule. All other compounds in this category are lyophilized vials requiring BAC water.

## N-Acetyl Semax Amidate vs Selank: How to Choose

Both are intranasal/injectable nootropic peptides originating from Russian neuropeptide research. They target different pathways and are often ordered together. N-Acetyl Semax Amidate is the more stimulating of the two. NA-Selank Amidate is the more calming, anxiolytic option. Neither requires reconstitution in the traditional peptide sense — they are typically dissolved in saline or BAC water at low concentrations for intranasal or subcutaneous use.

## Adamax vs N-Acetyl Semax Amidate

Adamax is a structurally modified Semax analog with enhanced stability. It's a step up in potency from standard Semax — typically used by researchers who have already worked with the N-Acetyl Semax Amidate. If you're new to Semax-class peptides, start with N-Acetyl Semax Amidate first.

## DSIP: What to Know

DSIP (Delta Sleep-Inducing Peptide) is a nonapeptide shipped as a lyophilized vial. It is one of the least expensive compounds on this shelf and is often added to a cart as a secondary compound alongside a primary nootropic peptide.

## Hitting the Free Shipping Threshold

Most individual nootropic peptide vials are priced below $100. Ordering two or three compounds — or the 120-capsule SLU-PP-332 pack — typically gets an order to the $200 free shipping threshold. Free tracked US shipping. Delivery 3–5 business days.

faq.question: What is N-Acetyl Semax Amidate?
faq.answer: N-Acetyl Semax Amidate is a stabilized, modified form of Semax — an ACTH(4-7)PGP-derived neuropeptide. The N-acetyl modification increases lipophilicity and CNS penetration; the amidate modification extends half-life. Available in a 30mg vial.

faq.question: What is the difference between Selank and NA-Selank Amidate?
faq.answer: Selank is the base tuftsin-derived heptapeptide (10mg). NA-Selank Amidate is an N-acetylated and amidated modification with greater metabolic stability. Both are separate products — available in 10mg and 30mg for NA-Selank.

faq.question: What is Adamax?
faq.answer: Adamax is a Selank-derived analog with enhanced cognitive and anxiolytic research profile. Available as a 10mg lyophilized vial.

faq.question: How does DSIP work in research?
faq.answer: Delta sleep-inducing peptide (DSIP) is a nonapeptide originally isolated from rabbit cerebral venous blood. Research focuses on its putative role in sleep stage regulation and neuromodulation. It is available in 5mg, 10mg, and 15mg sizes.

faq.question: What is SLU-PP-332?
faq.answer: SLU-PP-332 is a pan-ERR agonist (ERRα/γ) studied as an exercise mimetic in animal models. Available as 100mg capsules (30 or 120 count), 1mg micro-capsules, and liquid solutions at 1mg/mL and 5mg/mL.

name: Longevity Peptides
h1: Shop Longevity Peptides — Epitalon, NAD+, MOTS-c, SS-31 & Senolytics
seoTitle: Buy Longevity Peptides Online — Epitalon, NAD+, MOTS-c, SS-31, FOXO4-DRI | Peptides Online
seoDescription: Buy longevity and anti-aging peptides — Epitalon, NA-Epitalon, NAD+, MOTS-c, SS-31, FOXO4-DRI and PNC-27. ≥98% HPLC purity, free US shipping over $200.
content:
## What's on the Longevity Shelf

Seven products: Epitalon (10mg and 50mg), NA-Epitalon Amidate, NAD+ (500mg and 1000mg), FOXO4-DRI, PNC-27, MOTS-c (10mg, 20mg, 40mg), and SS-31 (10mg, 25mg, 50mg). All lyophilized vials include a lot CoA. This is one of the highest-value-per-order categories in the catalog — many researchers order multiple compounds in a single cart to hit the free shipping threshold.

## Epitalon: 10mg vs 50mg

Epitalon is the most-ordered longevity peptide in the catalog. The 50mg vial is the significantly better value — roughly one-third the $/mg of the 10mg. If you plan more than a short protocol, the 50mg is the right choice. Both sizes ship with a lot CoA and require BAC water reconstitution.

## MOTS-c Sizing Guide

MOTS-c comes in 10mg, 20mg, and 40mg vials. The 40mg vial has the lowest $/mg. It's a relatively expensive compound at the 10mg entry ($129.99), so most researchers ordering it commit to the 20mg or 40mg on the first order.

## SS-31 Sizing Guide

SS-31 (Elamipretide) comes in 10mg ($99.99), 25mg, and 50mg. The 50mg vial offers the best $/mg. Unlike many longevity peptides, SS-31 is a tetrapeptide — very stable in lyophilized form and after reconstitution.

## NAD+: 500mg vs 1000mg

NAD+ vials are larger-format than standard peptide vials. The 1000mg vial is the better value per milligram. NAD+ is often ordered alongside MOTS-c or SS-31 as a complementary compound. It does not require the same ultra-low temperature storage as some longevity peptides — standard freezer storage is fine.

## Building a Longevity Order

Epitalon 50mg + MOTS-c 20mg + NAD+ 500mg comfortably clears the $200 free shipping threshold. All require bacteriostatic water for reconstitution. Add one 30mL BAC water vial ($12.99) per order — it covers multiple reconstitutions. Store unreconstituted vials at −20°C; refrigerate after reconstitution and use within 30 days.

faq.question: What is Epitalon?
faq.answer: Epitalon is a synthetic tetrapeptide (Ala-Glu-Asp-Gly) derived from the natural polypeptide Epithalamin, isolated from bovine pineal gland. Research interest centers on telomerase regulation and circadian signaling. CAS 307297-39-8. Available in 10mg and 50mg.

faq.question: What is the difference between Epitalon and NA-Epitalon?
faq.answer: Epitalon is the base tetrapeptide. NA-Epitalon Amidate has an N-terminal acetyl group and C-terminal amide modification, which improve enzymatic stability and may alter pharmacokinetics. Different molecules — kept as separate products.

faq.question: What is MOTS-c?
faq.answer: MOTS-c (Mitochondria-derived peptide) is encoded in the 12S rRNA gene of mitochondrial DNA. Research focuses on its roles in metabolic homeostasis, insulin sensitivity, and longevity signaling. Available in 10mg, 20mg, and 40mg.

faq.question: What is SS-31 (Elamipretide)?
faq.answer: SS-31 is a cell-permeable tetrapeptide that selectively targets and concentrates at the inner mitochondrial membrane. It is studied for mitochondrial membrane protection and bioenergetics support. Available in 10mg, 25mg, and 50mg.

faq.question: What is FOXO4-DRI?
faq.answer: FOXO4-DRI is a retro-inverso peptide that interferes with the FOXO4-p53 interaction in senescent cells, studied as a senolytic compound. Available in a single 10mg vial at $149.99.

name: Immune & Hormonal Peptides
h1: Shop Immune & Hormonal Peptides — Thymosin, PT-141, Oxytocin & More
seoTitle: Buy Immune & Hormonal Peptides Online — Thymosin Alpha-1, PT-141, Oxytocin, KPV | Peptides Online
seoDescription: Buy immune and hormonal peptides — Thymosin Alpha-1, LL-37, PT-141, Kisspeptin-10, Gonadorelin, Oxytocin, KPV, ARA-290, VIP. ≥98% HPLC purity, free US shipping over $200.
content:
## What's on the Immune & Hormonal Shelf

Ten products: Thymosin Alpha-1 (5mg and 10mg), LL-37, PT-141 (10mg), Kisspeptin-10 (5mg and 10mg), Gonadorelin, Oxytocin (8mg and 10mg), KPV (5mg and 10mg), ARA-290, and VIP (5mg and 10mg). All lyophilized vials include a lot CoA and ship same-day before 2pm EST.

## Thymosin Alpha-1: 5mg vs 10mg

Thymosin Alpha-1 comes in 5mg and 10mg vials. The 10mg is the better value per milligram and is the more common choice for anything beyond a single short protocol. Both ship with a lot CoA and require bacteriostatic water for reconstitution.

## PT-141 (Bremelanotide): What to Know Before Ordering

PT-141 is a 10mg lyophilized vial. It is FDA-approved (as Vyleesi) for HSDD — the only peptide on this shelf with a US drug approval. As a research compound it ships as an off-label vial at research-grade purity. Reconstitute with BAC water. Priced at the mid-range of this category.

## KPV and VIP: Both Have Two Size Options

KPV comes in 5mg and 10mg; VIP comes in 5mg and 10mg. For both, the 10mg vial is the better $/mg. Both are short peptides (KPV is a tripeptide, VIP is a 28-mer) and are very stable in lyophilized form.

## Oxytocin Sizing

Oxytocin comes in 8mg and 10mg vials. The 10mg is a modest step up in quantity for a small price increase — the better value per milligram. Oxytocin is one of the more price-accessible compounds on this shelf.

## Gonadorelin

Gonadorelin is a single-size product in this category. It is a synthetic GnRH decapeptide and one of the most affordable compounds on this shelf — a good add-on when building an order to the free shipping threshold.

## Free Shipping Strategy

Many individual immune/hormonal peptides are priced under $80. Build a cart with two to three compounds from this category — or combine with a product from another category — to clear the $200 free shipping threshold. Free tracked US delivery. 3–5 business days.

faq.question: What is Thymosin Alpha-1?
faq.answer: Thymosin Alpha-1 is a 28 amino acid polypeptide derived from thymosin fraction 5. Research focuses on T-cell maturation, immune modulation, and antiviral applications. Available in 5mg and 10mg. CAS 62304-98-7.

faq.question: What is KPV?
faq.answer: KPV is a tripeptide fragment (Lys-Pro-Val) of α-MSH(11-13). Research focuses on anti-inflammatory signaling, particularly in gut and skin contexts. Available in 5mg and 10mg.

faq.question: What is PT-141?
faq.answer: PT-141 (Bremelanotide) is a cyclic heptapeptide melanocortin receptor agonist (MC1R, MC3R, MC4R). Research focuses on its role in sexual arousal and motivation pathways. CAS 189691-06-3. Available as a single 10mg vial.

faq.question: What is ARA-290?
faq.answer: ARA-290 (Cibinetide) is a non-erythropoietic EPO analog that targets the innate repair receptor (IRR). Research focuses on neuroprotection, anti-inflammatory effects, and metabolic applications. Available in a single 10mg vial.

faq.question: What is VIP?
faq.answer: VIP (Vasoactive Intestinal Peptide) is a 28 amino acid neuropeptide with roles in smooth muscle relaxation, immune modulation, and circadian rhythm regulation. Available in 5mg and 10mg.

name: Energy & Metabolic Peptides
h1: Shop Energy & Metabolic Compounds — BAM-15, AICAR, Glutathione & More
seoTitle: Buy Energy & Metabolic Compounds Online — BAM-15, AICAR, Glutathione, Methylene Blue | Peptides Online
seoDescription: Buy energy and metabolic research compounds — BAM-15, AICAR, Glutathione, L-Carnitine, Methylene Blue, O-304 and Adipotide. ≥98% HPLC purity, free US shipping over $200.
content:
## What's on the Energy & Metabolic Shelf

Ten products: BAM-15, AICAR, Glutathione (200mg, 600mg, 1500mg), L-Carnitine, Methylene Blue, O-304, and Adipotide (5mg and 10mg). A mix of lyophilized vials and specialty compounds. All vials include a lot CoA.

## Glutathione: The Best-Value Entry Point

Glutathione is the most accessible compound on this shelf. It comes in three sizes:
- 200mg — cheapest entry, lowest $/mg for small quantities
- 600mg — mid-size, good value
- 1500mg — largest vial, lowest $/mg overall

The 1500mg vial is the clear best value if you're planning an extended protocol. Reconstitution required — add a 30mL BAC water vial.

## BAM-15: Liquid Format Notes

BAM-15 comes in liquid format at two concentrations. Unlike lyophilized vials, it does not need reconstitution — no BAC water required. Check the product page for current concentration and volume details.

## AICAR: Pricing and Sizing

AICAR is a lyophilized vial compound. It is in the higher price range of this category. If you're building a cart that combines AICAR with Glutathione or L-Carnitine, you'll likely clear the $200 free shipping threshold with two to three items.

## Adipotide: 5mg vs 10mg

Adipotide comes in 5mg and 10mg vials. The 10mg is the better $/mg. It requires BAC water reconstitution. This is a specialty compound with limited published pricing context — check the product page for current pricing.

## Methylene Blue and L-Carnitine

These are the most price-accessible compounds on this shelf and frequently added as cart builders when an order is close to the $200 free shipping threshold. Methylene Blue ships as a liquid solution — no reconstitution needed. L-Carnitine is available as a lyophilized powder.

## Free Shipping and Order Building

Orders over $200 ship free via tracked US courier, 3–5 business days. Glutathione 1500mg alone typically clears the threshold. For metabolic compound stacks, combining AICAR, Glutathione, and L-Carnitine is a common order that ships free.

faq.question: What is BAM-15?
faq.answer: BAM-15 is a mitochondrial protonophore that uncouples the electron transport chain, studied for its ability to increase oxygen consumption and energy expenditure in preclinical models. Available as a liquid solution at 30mg/mL and 50mg/mL (30mL bottles each).

faq.question: What is AICAR?
faq.answer: AICAR (5-Aminoimidazole-4-carboxamide ribonucleotide) is a cell-permeable AMPK activator. AMPK is the master metabolic kinase. AICAR is used in cell and animal studies of metabolic regulation. CAS 2627-69-2. Available in a single 50mg vial.

faq.question: What is Glutathione?
faq.answer: Glutathione (L-γ-glutamyl-L-cysteinylglycine, CAS 70-18-8) is the body's master endogenous antioxidant tripeptide. Research uses include oxidative stress models and immune function studies. Available in 200mg, 600mg, and 1500mg for significant $/mg savings at scale.

faq.question: What are the L-Carnitine solutions?
faq.answer: L-Carnitine is available as two separate liquid concentrations (400mg/mL and 600mg/mL) and as a 600mg/mL 5-pack bundle. These are different formulations, not size variants of the same product.

faq.question: What is Methylene Blue used for in research?
faq.answer: Methylene Blue (phenothiazine, CAS 61-73-4) is studied for its role as a mitochondrial electron carrier, its inhibition of nitric oxide synthase, and its potential as a nootropic and neuroprotective compound. Available as a 10mg/mL 50mL solution.

name: Khavinson Bioregulators
h1: Shop Khavinson Bioregulators — 16 Russian Tissue-Specific Peptides
seoTitle: Buy Khavinson Bioregulators Online — Pinealon, Epitalon, Cardiogen, Bronchogen | Peptides Online
seoDescription: Buy Khavinson peptide bioregulators — Pinealon, Epitalon, Cardiogen, Bronchogen, Cortagen, Thymogen and 10 more organ-specific short peptides. ≥98% HPLC purity, free US shipping over $200.
content:
## What's on the Khavinson Shelf

Sixteen organ-specific peptide bioregulators developed by Vladimir Khavinson's group in St. Petersburg: Bronchogen, Cardiogen, Cartalax, Chonluten, Cortagen, Crystagen, Livagen, Ovagen, Pancragen, Pinealon, Prostamax, Testagen, Thymogen, Vesilute, Vesugen, and Vilon. Each is a short di- to tetra-peptide (2–4 amino acids) derived from or targeting a specific organ or tissue. Pinealon is available in 10mg and 20mg sizes; most others ship in single-size formats.

## How to Choose a Bioregulator

Each bioregulator is named and designed for a specific tissue target:
- **Brain / nervous system:** Cortagen, Pinealon
- **Heart:** Cardiogen
- **Lung / airway:** Bronchogen, Chonluten
- **Liver:** Livagen, Ovagen
- **Pancreas:** Pancragen
- **Cartilage / joints:** Cartalax
- **Thymus / immune:** Thymogen, Vilon
- **Testes / male hormonal:** Testagen, Prostamax
- **Vasculature:** Vesugen
- **Bladder:** Vesilute
- **Eyes:** Crystagen

Select based on the tissue system relevant to the protocol. Many researchers order Pinealon alongside the Longevity category compounds (Epitalon is also a Khavinson bioregulator but is listed in the Longevity category for discoverability).

## Pinealon: 10mg vs 20mg

Pinealon (Glu-Asp-Arg) is the most-ordered Khavinson bioregulator on the shelf and the only one stocked in two sizes. The 20mg vial is the better $/mg. If you're ordering Pinealon for more than a brief protocol, the 20mg is the right choice.

## Thymogen and Vilon: The Thymic Pair

Thymogen (Glu-Trp) and Vilon (Lys-Glu) are the two shortest bioregulators — both dipeptides targeting the thymic/immune axis. They are frequently ordered together. Both require BAC water reconstitution and are among the more affordable compounds in this category.

## Building an Order

Khavinson bioregulators are compact, moderately priced compounds. Ordering three to four of them typically clears the $200 free shipping threshold. All require bacteriostatic water for reconstitution (one 30mL BAC water vial covers multiple reconstitutions). Store at −20°C; refrigerate after reconstitution and use within 30 days. Same-day dispatch before 2pm EST. Free tracked US shipping over $200. Delivery 3–5 business days.

faq.question: What are Khavinson peptide bioregulators?
faq.answer: Khavinson bioregulators are short peptides (2–4 amino acids) developed by Prof. Vladimir Khavinson and colleagues at the St. Petersburg Institute of Bioregulation. Each targets a specific organ or tissue type and is studied for tissue-specific regulatory signaling.

faq.question: Are all Khavinson bioregulators the same price?
faq.answer: Most bioregulators are $79.99 per 20mg vial. Testagen is $89.99. Pinealon is available in 10mg ($69.99) and 20mg ($119.99) sizes.

faq.question: What is the difference between Vilon, Thymogen, and Thymosin Alpha-1?
faq.answer: Vilon (Lys-Glu) and Thymogen (Glu-Trp) are Khavinson short dipeptides from thymic fraction extracts. Thymosin Alpha-1 is a 28 amino acid polypeptide from a different isolation — a longer, structurally distinct molecule from a separate research tradition.

faq.question: What is Pinealon specifically?
faq.answer: Pinealon is a Khavinson tripeptide (Glu-Asp-Arg) targeting the pineal gland. It is studied for circadian rhythm regulation and neuroprotective signaling. Available in 10mg and 20mg — the only Khavinson bioregulator with two size options in this catalog.

faq.question: Do Khavinson peptides need bacteriostatic water?
faq.answer: Yes — all Khavinson bioregulators are lyophilized powders requiring reconstitution with bacteriostatic water. Add a 30mL BAC water vial to your order. The standard reconstitution for a 20mg vial is 2mL BAC water for a 10mg/mL solution.
